title: Vanilla Overhaul Plus
body:
**This modpack aims to make your Minecraft experience a lot better .**
  
- Better Animations (Mobs and Player, UI, Menus, Chat and various blocks)
- Better Mob Behavior
- Better First and Third Person
- Better World Generation (Overworld, Nether, End)
- Better Sleep Mechanics
- Better Vanilla Structures
- Better UI
- Better Performance
- Improved Ladders
- Improved Falling Blocks Visuals
- Improved Cave Visuals
- Improved Various Entity Visuals
- Improved Crafting Table, Anvil, and Enchanting Table
- Improved Furnace, Blast furnace, Smoker, Brewing Stand and Jukebox
- Improved Nametags
- More Vanilla-Like details on mobs
- More Immersive Sounds and Musics
- More Vanilla-Like Structures
- More Vanilla-Like Blocks
- Double Door Mechanic
- Diagonal Walls, Fences and Glass Panes
- Weapons on player's back
- Overhauled Bosses (Wither, Ender Dragon)
- Shaders
> And More...

Mobs details are made with theses texture packs by Fresh_LX :
- [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations-extensions/files/5159352](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations-extensions/files/5159352)

- [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations-extensions/files/5159345](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations-extensions/files/5159345)

- [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations-extensions/files/5159310](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations-extensions/files/5159310)
